query: List every current high-speed camera model from Shimadzu high-speed cameras capable of 240fps or higher. For each model provide: model name, sensor size in mm, all resolution/FPS mode combinations (resolution width, resolution height, max fps at that resolution), crop factor per mode if known, bit depth, price tier (Purchase/Rental/Both), availability status (Current/Discontinued). Format as compact JSON array. Mark uncertain values UNVERIFIED.
